Be Unique

Design Humanizer helps turn generic AI-generated interfaces into cleaner, more intentional product screens.

How it works

Design Humanizer reads your AI-generated page, finds what feels generic, and shows how to make it feel designed.

01

Read the page

Design Humanizer scans the visible structure of your interface.

  • sections and cards
  • buttons and CTAs
  • spacing and repeated patterns
02

Find what feels generic

It detects the patterns that make AI-generated UI feel unfinished.

  • weak hierarchy
  • repeated cards
  • unclear visual focus
03

Suggest improvements

It gives practical design recommendations without changing your content.

  • stronger grouping
  • better rhythm
  • clearer CTA priority
04

Preview the result

You compare the same content with a cleaner, more intentional structure.

  • before and after view
  • improved composition
  • ready-to-apply direction

Answers before you join

Open full FAQ Ask a question
01 What does Design Humanizer actually do?

It analyzes an AI-generated interface and shows what feels generic: weak hierarchy, repeated cards, unclear focus, poor spacing, and low visual priority. Then it suggests how to make the same content feel more intentional.

02 Does it change my content?

No. Design Humanizer is focused on presentation, not rewriting your product. It helps improve structure, layout, hierarchy, spacing, and visual rhythm while keeping your original content.

03 Who is it for?

It is built for developers, indie hackers, no-code builders, students, and startup teams who use AI to generate interfaces but do not want to ship something that looks like a default AI template.

Design Humanizer

A Chrome extension for turning AI-generated interfaces into intentional product design.

How it worksQ&AFAQPrivacy Policy
